meta.title: Lucas Lopes — Mobile Developer
meta.description: Mobile development specialist with React Native, Kotlin, and Java. Creator of Projeto Guardião, awarded at Prêmio Proteção Brasil 2025.

hero.name: Lucas Lopes
hero.description: Specialist in mobile development with experience in mission-critical applications for workplace safety.

about.title: About me
about.p1: Mobile developer with years of experience building native and cross-platform applications. Currently at Arkium, where I lead the development of mobile solutions for workplace safety.
about.p2: Specialist in React Native (CLI and Expo), also proficient in native development with Java and Kotlin. Solid experience in API integration, IoT sensors, and real-time monitoring systems.

project.title: Featured project
project.name: Projeto Guardião
project.description: Remote monitoring app for work-at-height activities that transforms the worker's corporate phone into a link with the security control center.

monitoring.title: Real-time monitoring
monitoring.description: Continuous tracking of technician activity during work at height.

detection.title: Incident detection
detection.description: Automatic fall detection with rapid emergency response triggering.

compliance.title: NR-35 compliance
compliance.description: Full compliance with Brazil's NR-35 regulatory standard for work at height.

project.impact: Recognized by Brazil's Public Prosecutor's Office as a best practice in workplace safety.
project.readMore: Read the article on Revista Proteção

arkium.description: Development and maintenance of mission-critical mobile applications for workplace safety. Responsible for Projeto Guardião, from conception to delivery and ongoing maintenance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
contact.name: Name
